_example: Fill with {"file": "<path>", "reason": "<why>"}. Put spec/research files only — no code paths. Run `python3 .trellis/scripts/get_context.py --mode packages` to list available specs. Delete this line once real entries are added.

reason: backend spec 索引，快速定位需要参考的规范文件
新 HTTP 端点 /api/notifications*、/api/events 与 WS activity_event 必须遵守 HTTP + 协议规范（含认证、响应格式）
R2 已落定 broadcast_task_update 1s/event/scope 节流模板，activity_event 必须复用不重造
high_risk_confirm 是通知源之一，需要对齐现有 confirm 流程的事件语义
insert_vulnerability 插桩点所在表结构，确认 severity 字段与读取语义
HTTP 端点错误返回格式必须与既有 400/401/404/500 约定一致
notification publish/consume 路径日志级别与字段规范
channels / agent / cmdb 分层边界，避免 repo.py 反向依赖 channels 导致循环
